evidence_type: Peptide-based interaction proteomics comparing phosphorylated, unphosphorylated, and mutant peptides
post_cutoff_path: Published 2024-04-11; all evidence can be PMID/DOI dated after 2021
exact_mapping_to_current_columns: Use bait UniProt, phosphosite residue/position, prey UniProt, Phos, PMID, and phospho-vs-control differential binding
caveats: Mostly phosphorylation and peptide-context interactions; require source statistical cutoff and exact UniProt/site mapping

evidence_type: Manual regulatory-site curation with interaction effect text
post_cutoff_path: Query curated records with PMID dates >= 2022-01-01 for prospective; older PMID-disjoint records for Tier2
exact_mapping_to_current_columns: Use protein/site, interacting molecule, effect text, PMID, method
caveats: Use only interaction-specific induced/inhibited association language; licensing and bulk access should be checked before redistribution

evidence_type: Curated molecular-interaction feature records, including PTMs and mutations
exact_mapping_to_current_columns: Use affected protein, feature range/residue/type, interaction participants, PubMedID
caveats: Signed effect may be sparse; feature presence alone is Tier3 support only

evidence_type: Curated PTM sites and PTM relationship records
post_cutoff_path: Latest release compiled 2026-05-25; filter relationship PMIDs >= 2022-01-01
exact_mapping_to_current_columns: PTMTAB gives site protein, position, PTM type, residue, PMID; PTMREL gives relationship partner and relationship PMID
caveats: Relationship text often confirms association but not enhance/inhibit direction; avoid turning unlabeled relations into negatives

post_cutoff_path: Quarterly updated corpus; filter extracted PMIDs >= 2022-01-01
exact_mapping_to_current_columns: Use substrate, site, interacting protein, document ID, and relation/evidence sentence
caveats: Text-mined output requires manual sentence review before Tier1/Tier2 inclusion

evidence_type: Curated signaling, enzyme-PTM, and causal interaction records
post_cutoff_path: Use PMID/reference date filter >= 2022-01-01 where references are present
exact_mapping_to_current_columns: Use UniProt ids, PTM residue/offset where available, interaction sign, mechanism, references
caveats: Causal activity sign is not automatically PPI-effect sign; require binding mechanism and direct wording for signed validation

evidence_type: Phosphorylation-linked complex profiling and phosphosite mutant AP-MS
exact_mapping_to_current_columns: Use YAP1 bait, phosphosite, differential interactors, PMID/DOI, source statistics
caveats: Targeted YAP1 cohort; good mechanistic case study but not broad performance unless enough rows pass mapping

evidence_type: AP-MS comparing S232 phospho-mutant knock-in states
exact_mapping_to_current_columns: Use 14-3-3theta bait, S232, differential AP-MS prey proteins, phosphomimetic-vs-nonphosphorylatable direction
caveats: Mouse dataset and AP-MS contrast; may need orthology or mouse UniProt handling if validating a human-only model
